title: phoebe tetragona
intro: Phoebe tetragona, also known as Chinese snow lotus or white phoebe, is a plant species native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Lauraceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as phellodendrine and phellodendricine. The health benefits of Phoebe tetragona include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into various herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and extracts, to leverage its medicinal properties and alleviate various health conditions.
